evidence.snippet: *   Uncrewed/unmanned and autonomous aerial, ground, and maritime vehicles/systems

Spotlight Solution: Unmanned Ground Vehicles
--------------------------------------------
Kite-Strike II is purpose-built for unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) mission-critical applications:
– MIL-SPEC rugged
– SWaP-optimized
– Edge AI – Jetson AGX Orin SOM
– Can integrate multiple sensors and video formats
Ultra-compact and lightweight, SWaP-optimized for integration and deployment in highly space-constrained vehicles.

items.notes: MIL-SPEC rugged embedded mission computers described as 'brains of our vehicle' enabling autonomous/unmanned vehicle operation; Kite-Strike II spotlighted for UGV; Hawk-Strike IV explicitly listed for uncrewed/autonomous aerial, ground, and maritime vehicles

evidence.snippet:
### ISR Mission Computing
Systel enables immediate and emerging intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) capabilities for mission-critical applications in austere environments through best-in-class rugged server and embedded computing solutions.

items.notes: Systel provides C5ISR mission computing with video capture/encode, sensor ingest/processing in rugged single-LRU systems; supports US Navy, Coast Guard, DHS, CBP, Marine Corps via Minotaur suite

evidence.snippet:
*   AI and ML edge processing
*   Counter-UAS (C-UAS)
*   Radar
*   Electronic warfare (EW) and signals intelligence (SIGINT)
![quote\_icon](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxIiB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciPjwvc3ZnPg==)

Gray Wolf 2 is a rugged 2U HPC Supercomputer. Featuring immense processing capability including dual Latest Gen Intel Scalable Xeon CPUs, up to Two Dual Slot H100 GPUs with NVLINK, and 2 extra slots for half height full width add in cards. Gray Wolf 2 is the best-in-class choice for AI, SIGINT, EW/CW demanding workloads in austere environments.

items.notes: Raven-Strike II explicitly listed for EW/SIGINT and Counter-UAS; Gray Wolf 2 designed for AI, SIGINT, EW/CW workloads

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Systel designs and manufactures MIL-SPEC rugged embedded computers and rackmount servers integrated into UAV, UGV, and other uncrewed vehicle platforms by prime defense contractors. They are not OEMs of complete UAS platforms.

items.name: Sparrow-Strike
items.product_type: ultra-small-form-factor MIL-SPEC rugged edge AI compute module (NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX or x86)

evidence.snippet:
Sparrow-Strike
--------------
MIL-SPEC rugged USFF edge processor integrating the NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX or SMARC x86 CPU. Next-gen edge AI compute solution. The world's first MIL-SPEC rugged Jetson Orin NX edge AI compute solution on the market.

items.name: Kite-Strike II
items.product_type: SFF MIL-SPEC rugged embedded mission computer (NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin or Intel x86 COM-HPC)

evidence.snippet:
Kite-Strike II
--------------
MIL-SPEC rugged (certified) SFF mission computer integrating the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin or next-gen Intel x86 COM-HPC architecture that support a range of AI and compute at the edge applications.

items.name: Hawk-Strike IV
items.product_type: fully rugged multi-mission embedded computer / LRU

evidence.snippet:
Hawk-Strike IV
--------------
Fully Rugged Multi-Mission Embedded Computer. High-performance workstation-class single line replaceable unit (LRU) solution

items.name: Raven-Strike II
items.product_type: MIL-SPEC rugged server-class embedded compute solution

evidence.snippet:
---------------
MIL-SPEC rugged server-class compute solution, purpose-built for highly intensive workloads in austere environments. High performance, highly configurable with robust IO, high-capacity, high-speed storage.

Gray Wolf 2
-----------
High-Performance Rugged 2U HPC Rackmount Server

products.notes: Additional rackmount products (Gray Wolf 4, Arctic Wolf 3, HR3000, RM1000-3000, SB2600, IPC-series) are in corpus but not fully read; primary UXV-relevant products listed here.

evidence.snippet: All of our products are TAA-compliant and manufactured in the USA in our headquarters in Sugar Land, TX. We are proud to support your mission with American-made solutions.

ndaa.notes: Site claims TAA-compliance and 'Made in USA' manufacture but makes no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim.

evidence.snippet: Fully configurable 1U-4U form factors with numerous options. COTS and MCOTS solutions with thousands of systems deployed worldwide.

#### Proven Record of Success
30+ years of experience providing complex and advanced computer technologies to defense and commercial sectors worldwide. Thousands of systems deployed on enduring and emerging vehicles and platforms.

readiness.notes: Thousands of systems deployed worldwide; deep catalog of COTS and MCOTS mission-ready computing systems; manufacturing at Sugar Land TX HQ; routinely supports multi-year and multi-decade programs.

unresolved_questions: Whether Systel holds any NDAA Section 848/889 compliance certification - site only discloses TAA compliance and Made in USA manufacture
Full extent of rackmount product line UXV relevance (Gray Wolf 4, Arctic Wolf 3, IPC-series products)
tagline: Designs and manufactures rugged embedded flight-control computers (Sparrow-Strike, Kite-Strike II, Hawk-Strike IV, Raven-Strike II) and rackmount servers for autonomous UAS, C5ISR, and electronic warfare. In production across US Navy and Army programs. NDAA compliance status not disclosed; Blue UAS certification unknown. Public evidence of actual UAS integration limited.
